sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2531" key="ai)nikth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰνικ-τής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n2531.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αἰνικτήρ</ref></xr>, of Heraclitus, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg003.perseus-grc1:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
